# logtail_dashboard_group (Resource)

This resource allows you to create, modify, and delete Dashboard Groups. Dashboard Groups help organize dashboards in Better Stack Telemetry.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "logtail_dashboard_group" "production" {
  name = "Production Dashboards"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of this dashboard group.

### Optional

- `team_name` (String) Used to specify the team the resource should be created in when using global tokens.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The time when this dashboard group was created.
- `id` (String) The ID of this dashboard group.
- `updated_at` (String) The time when this dashboard group was updated.
